data.body: Remove Setlist fallback title/note scraping so rows show only knot ids when live beat data is missing. When a plan knot id is missing from the live list, use the kno CLI rehydrate path to restore it from warm/cold/event data before treating it as unavailable. Keep the fix isolated to Setlist and beat-detail lookup behavior.
data.title: Fix setlist missing-knot handling and cold rehydrate
